metadata.description: Marketing plugins by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in) for Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions) and Anthropic Cowork. Three plugins (Digital Marketing Pro, ContentForge, SocialForge) share a single `skills/` open-standard layout and ship with zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; all comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. EU AI Act Article 50 ready across all three plugins (C2PA content provenance signing). Full community standards: each plugin ships CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md (private vulnerability reporting via GitHub Private Security Advisories), Issue + PR templates, MIT-licensed. Shared model curator (`scripts/model_registry.json` + `resolve_model.py`) — single source of truth for every model id used by the plugins' scripts, with deprecated-id auto-fall-forward and a `refresh_models.py` drift report against live provider catalogs. Slash command syntax is canonical /<plugin-name>:<command> per Claude Code's auto-namespacing. v3.6.0 (2026-05-26): honest positioning. Removed the v3.3-v3.5 era claim of installing on 5 coding-agent surfaces (Claude Code + Cowork + OpenAI Codex + Cursor + GitHub Copilot CLI + Google Antigravity 2.0). A May 2026 research pass confirmed the Codex / Cursor / Copilot CLI / Antigravity manifests we shipped in those releases did not match the platforms' actual install specs and would have failed real install attempts. Supported surfaces from v3.6.0 onwards: Claude Code + Anthropic Cowork. Real multi-platform support is on the roadmap — research saved at memory/{antigravity,codex}-plugin-spec-may-2026.md.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions) and Anthropic Cowork.** EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing end-to-end tested against c2pa-python 0.32, pre-publish gate blocks unsigned AI assets for EU campaigns, draft implementing guidelines from 8 May 2026 baked into compliance rules). 6-platform AEO/GEO audit including Google AI Mode (Gemini 3.5 Flash, ~1B MAUs, default conversational search since Google I/O 2026). 16 privacy-law jurisdictions (GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, DPDPA, LGPD, CASL, PIPEDA, UK GDPR + 8 more). 14 HTTP MCP connectors. 77 Python scripts (optional). 167 reference knowledge files. 14 top-level slash commands. v3.7.13 (2026-05-26): honest positioning — removed v3.6/v3.7 era invented manifests for OpenAI Codex / Cursor / GitHub Copilot CLI / Google Antigravity 2.0. v3.7.11 closes the resolver loop with scripts/connector_executor.py — a stdlib urllib HTTP executor that fires manifests against real APIs for 8 verified connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Klaviyo, SendGrid, Brevo, Customer.io, Mailchimp, Ahrefs) with credential substitution, write-op --confirm gate, audit logging, and per-endpoint success-code handling. 25 OAuth-only connectors return execute_blocked_reason='use MCP path' with the manifest still returned. /digital-marketing-pro:doctor shows readiness; /digital-marketing-pro:execute-action fires individual actions. Test harnesses: 27 resolver scenarios + 17 mock-HTTP-server executor tests, all 44 pass. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside ContentForge and SocialForge.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 specialist agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, fact-checker subagent, three-category internal linking (topical / commercial / authority), real .docx output with embedded SEO + Quality + Production + Internal-Link appendices. **EU AI Act Article 50 ready** — C2PA content provenance signing for the .docx output (applicable 2 Aug 2026) via --c2pa-sign on scripts/generate-docx.py. **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions) and Anthropic Cowork.** v3.12.11 (2026-05-26): honest positioning — removed v3.11/v3.12 era invented manifests for OpenAI Codex / Cursor / GitHub Copilot CLI / Google Antigravity 2.0. v3.12.10 closed three Cowork-with-Drive roadmap items (cross-session checkpoint resume, brand-profile read-back from Drive, multi-team namespace isolation). v3.12.3 fixed two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + /contentforge:resume command. /contentforge:output-folder reveals the visible output folder. v3.10.0 added C2PA .docx signing. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs (16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors catalogued in .mcp.json.connectors-reference). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and SocialForge.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them), AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026). **16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors, 0 global hooks.** Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions) and Anthropic Cowork.** v1.8.5 (2026-05-26): honest positioning — removed v1.7/v1.8 era invented manifests for OpenAI Codex / Cursor / GitHub Copilot CLI / Google Antigravity 2.0. v1.6.0 added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance signing (75-byte test PNG → ~43 KB signed PNG with manifest_embedded_and_verified=true). May 2026 channel pack: TikTok USDS post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP, YouTube AI labeling, Sora deprecation → defaults to Runway Gen-4 / Veo 3.x / Kling 3.0. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and ContentForge.
